response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his recent work is heavily focused on TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent tooling, which raises concerns about his readiness for the core C++-centric routing tile responsibilities.
strengths: Built and maintains an open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and learn new languages (DLang, C++, JavaScript)
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and systems-level problem solving
concerns: No clear evidence of commercial C++ or Rust development in routing, navigation, or geospatial data pipelines
Recent roles focus on TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure, not low-latency data processing
Lacks explicit experience with distributed systems concepts like fault tolerance or service discovery in production routing contexts
